systemic_issues: Notion/source hygiene is largely remediated, with remaining duplicate or historical source rows paused instead of active
Local repo truth is still fragmented across dirty codex branches, duplicate worktrees, and inconsistent upstream naming
Missing dependency baselines block stronger verification on SpecCompanion, Chronomap, Echolocate, and likely OrbitForge staging
PR and workflow noise still obscures readiness on several active projects
A few projects still need portfolio decisions, especially DeepTank merge targeting and duplicate local surface retirement
blockers: Dirty worktrees and duplicate repo surfaces still require repo-by-repo cleanup that preserves existing user work
Missing dependency installs block stronger static verification on SpecCompanion, Chronomap, and Echolocate
DeepTank still has no confirmed merge target
AI Workflow Accelerator remains a fuzzy backlog near-match worth manual confirmation before any future duplicate cleanup
done_definition: The batch is done when operating truth is current even if project execution work remains
Each project has one current operating row, no active stale placeholder source row, one canonical active GitHub source row, and evidence-based blocker text
Those Notion-side audit and remediation conditions are now met for this batch
Separate repo cleanup, dependency restoration, and finish/archive decisions are still required before individual projects are fully set
